title: QUEER PEERS - 211info
text: JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES QUEER PEERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a gender and sexuality support group. Snacks provided. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Middle school-aged youth Hours: Monday 4:30pm-5:45pm Email (541) 745-4590 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 745-4590 Cortney Wetherel Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, text, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Services: LGBTQ2+ Support Groups * Youth Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS HOUSING/SHELTER - NEXT STEPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT 541 LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - TOPSOCCER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
